content: {"file": "backend/ingestion/ingest_pdfs.py", "summary": "This file contains logic for ingesting PDF documents into a ChromaDB collection named `sf_user_manuals`. It recursively searches through a specified folder for PDF files, extracts text from each page of the PDF, splits the text into manageable chunks, and then adds these chunks to the database. The process includes handling exceptions and providing progress updates.", "rules": [{"name": "_extract_pdf_text", "description": "Extracts text content from a given PDF file path.", "conditions": ["pdf_path is provided"], "actions": ["Reads the PDF using pypdf, extracts text from each page, and returns it as a string."]}, {"name": "_chunk_pdf", "description": "Splits extracted PDF text into chunks suitable for embedding in a vector store.", "conditions": ["full_text is not empty"], "actions": ["Uses RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter to split the full text into smaller chunks, creates Document objects with metadata, and returns them."]}, {"name": "ingest_pdfs", "description": "Ingests all PDF files found in a specified folder into ChromaDB.", "conditions": ["folder_path is provided"], "actions": ["Recursively finds all .pdf files in the given path, processes each file to extract text and split it into chunks, adds these chunks to the vector store, tracks progress and errors."]}], "dependencies": ["langchain_core.documents", "langchain_text_splitters.RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter", "pypdf.PdfReader", "ingestion.chroma_client.get_vector_store"]}
